operating_state: Total revenue reached $34.1 billion in Q3 2023, up 23% year-over-year, driven by advertising revenue recovery as advertiser demand strengthened globally. Family of Apps revenue increased with daily active users reaching 3.14 billion, while Reality Labs revenue declined due to lower Quest sales. Ad impressions grew 31% though average price per ad declined 6% due to geographic mix shifts toward lower-monetizing regions and Reels format adoption.
cost_structure: Total costs decreased 7% driven by workforce reductions and operational discipline, expanding operating margin to 40% from 20% prior year. Research and development expenses remained elevated reflecting continued AI and metaverse investments, with Reality Labs generating operating losses. Cost of revenue increased primarily from data center and infrastructure expansion supporting AI initiatives.
material_events: Completed share repurchases during nine months with authorization remaining and declared inaugural quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share. Executed workforce reduction of approximately 10,000 employees incurring severance costs as part of efficiency initiatives. Issued long-term debt in May 2023 and received court approval for Cambridge Analytica settlement in October 2023.
macro_exposures: Irish Data Protection Commission imposed €1.2 billion GDPR fine for EU-US data transfer violations, under appeal with interim protection. EU Digital Markets Act implementation in early 2024 requires substantial product modifications and operational changes with escalating compliance costs. Foreign exchange provided favorable quarterly impact but created unfavorable nine-month revenue translation impact.
forward_outlook: Management expects Q4 2023 revenue between $36.5-40.0 billion reflecting continued advertising recovery and seasonal strength, with capital expenditures projected supporting AI infrastructure buildout. Reality Labs operating losses expected to increase meaningfully as metaverse investments accelerate while maintaining focus on AI integration across products and long-term immersive computing platform development.
uncertainty_profile: FTC administrative proceedings seek consent order modifications including restrictions on minor data use and potential board composition changes, with company challenging agency process in federal court. IRS transfer pricing disputes could result in additional federal tax liability plus interest with Tax Court opinion expected in 2024. Multiple antitrust investigations seek divestiture of acquisitions while expanding litigation addresses alleged social media addiction impacts.
